case_title: ZENDA SU VS. HERMAN CHEN et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO TEHAMA COUNTY*****

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT OLIVE NINETY-NINE CORPORATION JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT OLIVE NINETY-NINE CORPORATION MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE CONTINUED FROM SEP-10-2009 TO LAW AND MOTION AT SEP-22-2009, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES.
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL L PICKERING IN REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT OLIVE NINETY-NINE CORPORATION'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT OLIVE NINETY-NINE CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT OLIVE NINETY-NINE CORPORATION MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE FROM SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT TO TEHAMA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT, STATE OF CALIFORNIA. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE GRANTED. CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO TEHAMA COUNTY, THE CORPORATION'S PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS. (CCP SECTION 395.5.) REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES DENIED. (THE COURT ADDS: PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MAY STILL BRING A MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO A DIFFERENT COUNTY AT A LATER DATE.) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice And Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT OLIVE NINETY-NINE CORPORATION Motion to Change Venue from San Francisco Superior Court to Tehama County Superior Court, State of California. Appearances: Peter S. Hwu, Attorney at Law, (415) 398-8329 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Jerrald K. Pickering Jr., Esq. of Pickering Law Corporation (530) 241-5811, appearing thru CourtCall for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for change of venue granted. Case is transferred to Tehama County, the corporation's principal place of business. (CCP section 395.5.) Request for attorney fees denied. (The Court adds: Plaintiff's counsel may still bring a motion for change of venue to a different county at a later date.) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
